seoTitle: Kiwarrak vs Knights Hill — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Kiwarrak and Knights Hill. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Kiwarrak vs Knights Hill: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Kiwarrak and Knights Hill.
heading: Kiwarrak vs Knights Hill — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Kiwarrak, New South Wales and Knights Hill, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Knights Hill has a lower overall climate risk score (40/100) compared to Kiwarrak (44/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Kiwarrak or Knights Hill safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Kiwarrak has a flood risk score of 44/100, while Knights Hill scores 59/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Kiwarrak scores 23/100 for bushfire risk. Knights Hill scores 52/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Kiwarrak or Knights Hill?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Knights Hill has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.1% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
